keywords.Metalcraft: Metalcraft abilities turn on while you control three or more artifacts.
keywords.Equip: Pay this cost and attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.
keywords.Cycling: Pay the cycling cost and discard this card to draw a card.
keywords.Kicker: You may pay an additional cost as you cast this spell. If you do, an extra effect resolves.
keywords.Ward: Whenever this becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays the ward cost.
keywords.Protection: This can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything matching the specified quality.
keywords.Indestructible: Effects that say 'destroy' don't destroy this.
keywords.Banding: Any creatures with banding, and up to one without, can attack in a band. The controller of an attacking or blocking band chooses how combat damage is divided.
keywords.Crew: Tap any number of creatures you control with total power equal to or greater than the crew value: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.
keywords.Affinity: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each permanent of the specified type you control.
keywords.Suspend: Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay its suspend cost and exile it with time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, cast it without paying its mana cost.
keywords.Unearth: Pay the unearth cost: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step or if it would leave the battlefield.
keywords.Partner with: When this creature enters, target player may put its named partner card into their hand from their library, then shuffle.
keywords.Foretell: During your turn, you may pay {2} and exile this card from your hand face down. Cast it on a later turn for its foretell cost.
keywords.Disguise: You may cast this card face down for {3} as a 2/2 creature with ward. Turn it face up any time for its disguise cost.
keywords.Plot: You may pay the plot cost and exile this card from your hand. Cast it as a sorcery on a later turn without paying its mana cost. Plot only as a sorcery.
keywords.Bushido: Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked, it gets a bonus to its power and toughness equal to its bushido value until end of turn.
keywords.Mutate: If you cast this spell for its mutate cost, put it over or under target non-Human creature you own. They mutate into the creature on top plus all the abilities from underneath.
keywords.Megamorph: You may cast this card face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. Turn it face up any time for its megamorph cost, then put a +1/+1 counter on it.
keywords.Saddle: Tap any number of other creatures you control with total power equal to or greater than the saddle value: This Mount becomes saddled until end of turn. Saddle only as a sorcery.
keywords.More Than Meets the Eye: You may cast this card converted for its alternate cost.
keywords.Buyback: You may pay an additional buyback cost as you cast this spell. If you do, put this card into your hand as it resolves.
keywords.Encore: Pay the encore cost, Exile this card from your graveyard: For each opponent, create a token copy that attacks that opponent this turn if able. Sacrifice the copies at the next end step. Encore only as a sorcery.
keywords.Level Up: Pay the level-up cost: Put a level counter on this. Level up only as a sorcery.
keywords.Soulshift: When this creature dies, you may return target Spirit card with mana value less than or equal to this creature's soulshift value from your graveyard to your hand.
keywords.Modular: This creature enters with a number of +1/+1 counters equal to its modular value. When it dies, you may put its +1/+1 counters on target artifact creature.
keywords.Devour: As this creature enters, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. This creature enters with that many times its devour value in +1/+1 counters on it.
keywords.Basic landcycling: Pay the basic landcycling cost, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
keywords.Vanishing: This permanent enters with a number of time counters on it equal to its vanishing value. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, sacrifice it.
keywords.Offspring: You may pay an additional offspring cost as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it.
keywords.Renown: When this creature deals combat damage to a player, if it isn't renowned, put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to its renown value on it and it becomes renowned.
keywords.Multikicker: You may pay an additional multikicker cost any number of times as you cast this spell.
keywords.Reconfigure: Pay the reconfigure cost: Attach to target creature you control, or unattach from a creature. Reconfigure only as a sorcery.
keywords.Sneak: You may cast this spell for its sneak cost if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step.
keywords.Firebending: Whenever this creature attacks, add a number of {R} equal to its firebending value. This mana lasts until end of combat.
keywords.Hexproof from: This permanent can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control that match the specified quality.
keywords.Champion: When this creature enters, sacrifice it unless you exile another creature you control of the specified type. When this creature leaves the battlefield, that exiled card returns to the battlefield under its owner's control.
keywords.Prowl: You may cast this spell for its prowl cost if you dealt combat damage to a player this turn with a creature of the specified type or your commander.
keywords.Hideaway: When this permanent enters, look at the top several cards of your library, exile one face down, then put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. You may play the exiled card from exile if its hideaway condition is met.
keywords.Annihilator: Whenever this creature attacks, defending player sacrifices a number of permanents equal to this creature's annihilator value, chosen by that player.
keywords.Dredge: If you would draw a card, you may mill a number of cards equal to this card's dredge value instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.
keywords.Graft: This creature enters with a number of +1/+1 counters equal to its graft value. Whenever another creature enters, you may move a +1/+1 counter from this creature onto it.
keywords.Afterlife: When this permanent is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, create a number of 1/1 white and black Spirit creature tokens with flying equal to its afterlife value.
keywords.Reinforce: Pay the reinforce cost, Discard this card: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's reinforce value on target creature.
keywords.Tribute: As this creature enters, an opponent of your choice may put a number of +1/+1 counters on it equal to its tribute value.
keywords.Amplify: As this creature enters, put a number of +1/+1 counters on it equal to its amplify value for each card of the specified creature type you reveal in your hand.
keywords.Rampage: Whenever this creature becomes blocked, it gets a bonus to its power and toughness equal to its rampage value times the number of creatures blocking it beyond the first, until end of turn.
keywords.Awaken: If you cast this spell for its awaken cost, also put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to its awaken value on target land you control and that land becomes a 0/0 Elemental creature with haste. It's still a land.
keywords.Transmute: Pay the transmute cost, Discard this card: Search your library for a card with the same mana value as this card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
keywords.Eternalize: Pay the eternalize cost, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a 4/4 black Zombie with no mana cost. Eternalize only as a sorcery.
keywords.Outlast: Pay the outlast cost, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Outlast only as a sorcery.
keywords.Mayhem: You may cast this card from your graveyard for its mayhem cost if you discarded it this turn.
keywords.Plainscycling: Pay the plainscycling cost, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
keywords.Mountaincycling: Pay the mountaincycling cost, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
keywords.Forestcycling: Pay the forestcycling cost, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
keywords.Islandcycling: Pay the islandcycling cost, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
keywords.Swampcycling: Pay the swampcycling cost, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
keywords.Mill: To mill a number of cards, put that many cards from the top of the affected player's library into their graveyard.
keywords.Scry: To scry, look at the top cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom of your library and the rest back on top in any order.
keywords.Surveil: To surveil, look at the top cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest back on top in any order.
keywords.Investigate: To investigate, create a colorless Clue artifact token with '{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.'
keywords.Fight: When two creatures fight, each deals damage equal to its power to the other.
keywords.Proliferate: To proliferate, choose any number of permanents and players with counters on them, then give each another counter of each kind already there.
keywords.Goad: A goaded creature attacks each combat if able, and attacks a player other than the player who goaded it if able.
keywords.Manifest: To manifest the top card of your library, put it onto the battlefield face down as a 2/2 creature. Turn it face up any time for its mana cost if it's a creature card.
keywords.Explore: To explore, reveal the top card of your library. If it's a land, put it into your hand. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then return that card to its place or put it into your graveyard.
keywords.Amass: To amass, put +1/+1 counters on an Army you control equal to the amass value. The Army gains the specified creature type. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Army creature token of the specified type first.
keywords.Raid: Raid abilities trigger if you attacked with a creature this turn.
keywords.Channel: Channel abilities can be activated by discarding this card from your hand.
keywords.Monstrosity: If this creature isn't monstrous, put +1/+1 counters on it equal to its monstrosity value and it becomes monstrous.
keywords.Incubate: To incubate, create a colorless Incubator token with the specified +1/+1 counters that can be transformed for {2} into a colorless Phyrexian artifact creature with the specified power and toughness.
keywords.Escape: You may cast this card from your graveyard by paying its escape cost and exiling the required number of other cards from your graveyard.
keywords.Discover: When you discover, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with mana value equal to or less than the discover value. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.
keywords.Populate: To populate, choose a creature token you control and create a token that's a copy of that creature.
keywords.Exert: When you exert this creature, it doesn't untap during your next untap step.
keywords.Converge: Converge abilities scale with the number of distinct colors of mana spent to cast this spell.
keywords.Adapt: If this creature has no +1/+1 counters on it, put +1/+1 counters on it equal to its adapt value.
keywords.Bolster: To bolster, choose a creature with the least toughness among creatures you control and put +1/+1 counters on it equal to the bolster value.
keywords.Connive: To connive, draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card this way, put a +1/+1 counter on the conniving creature.
keywords.Clash: To clash, each clashing player reveals the top card of their library and may put it on top or bottom. A player wins the clash if their card's mana value is greater than the others.
keywords.Landfall: Landfall abilities trigger whenever a land enters the battlefield under your control.
keywords.Threshold: Threshold abilities are active as long as you have seven or more cards in your graveyard.
keywords.Delirium: Delirium abilities are active as long as there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard.
keywords.Constellation: Constellation abilities trigger whenever an enchantment enters the battlefield under your control.
keywords.Heroic: Heroic abilities trigger whenever you cast a spell that targets this creature.
keywords.Magecraft: Magecraft abilities trigger whenever you cast or copy an instant or sorcery spell.
keywords.Morbid: Morbid abilities are active or trigger if a creature died this turn.
keywords.Enrage: Enrage abilities trigger whenever this creature is dealt damage.
keywords.Corrupted: Corrupted abilities are active or trigger while an opponent has three or more poison counters.
keywords.Max speed: Max speed abilities are active only while your speed is 4 (the maximum).
keywords.Earthbend: Target land you control becomes a 0/0 creature with haste that's still a land. Put +1/+1 counters on it equal to the earthbend value. When it dies or is exiled, return it to the battlefield tapped.
keywords.Waterbend: While paying a waterbend cost, you can tap your artifacts and creatures to help pay. Each one taps for {1}.
keywords.Venture into the dungeon: When you venture, choose a dungeon to enter or advance through if you're already inside one. Take the listed action on the next room.
keywords.Exhaust: Each exhaust ability can be activated only once per game.
keywords.Manifest dread: Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one onto the battlefield face down as a 2/2 creature and the other into your graveyard. Turn it face up any time for its mana cost if it's a creature card.
keywords.Prepared: Prepared abilities are active while this creature is prepared. Casting a copy of its spell unprepares it.
keywords.Bloodthirst: If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, this creature enters with +1/+1 counters on it equal to its bloodthirst value.

_note: Hand-maintained overrides. Empty string = SKIP. Overrides win over reminder_text.json. PHASE 3 EVAL FOLLOW-UPS: Suspend/Foretell/Plot wording may need 'cast from exile' / 'cast not from hand' search-term emphasis if eval shows queries for those concepts miss these cards.
